economic_notes: Nation operates fisheries (Kitasoo Seafoods LP revenue $4.28M), forestry (Kitasoo Forestry LP revenue $9.84M), tourism (Spirit Bear Adventures LP revenue $2.46M), hydro power (Kitasoo Hydro Power Ltd.), fuel (First Nations Fuel), band store, and aquafarms. Modified equity method applied to GBEs and GBPs. During year, previously consolidated investments in government business partnerships were reclassified to modified equity method.
notes: Auditor is Ribeyre CPA based in Port Coquitlam BC. Nation located in Klemtu BC. Complex consolidation includes 12 fully consolidated subsidiaries plus 7 GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method. During the year, previously consolidated government business partnerships were reclassified to modified equity method. Total government transfers estimated to include ISC ($11.56M), FNHA ($2.34M), Province of BC ($1.15M), BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing ($0.97M), CCIRA ($0.89M), Coast Opportunity Funds ($0.79M), CFN LNG ($0.35M), DFO ($0.89M), FNESC ($0.56M), Resource Stewardship ($1.02M), Treaty Negotiations ($0.40M), Social Housing Fund ($0.23M) = ~$20.72M. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Prior year accumulated surplus opening balance shown as $69,811,053 in the 2024 statement vs $83,415,147 shown as 2023 closing — this discrepancy may be due to the reclassification of GBPs from consolidation to equity method restating the prior year. Housing and Social Housing combined for expenses_housing. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $5.76M to $8.95M.
